response.step_by_step_log:
1. Observed video to identify the song and performer. On-screen text "#白銀ノエル生誕祭2025" indicates the event is Shirogane Noel's Birthday Festival. The song title "輝夜の城で踊りたい" was identified from on-screen text during the performance.
2. Searched for "輝夜の城で踊りたい lyrics" to confirm the song and find original Japanese lyrics and English translation.
3. Confirmed the original artist as μ's.
4. Created a two-part scene breakdown: solo performance (00:00-00:50) and group performance (00:50-04:58).
5. Compiled the lyrics and formatted the final JSON.
response.global_summary: A virtual stage performance of the song "Kaguya no Shiro de Odoritai" performed by VTuber Shirogane Noel, later joined by other performers, during the #ShiroganeNoelBirthdayFestival2025 event.

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel performs the song solo on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
おいで! おいで! 誘惑の Dance again
おいでよおいで! 輝夜の城へ
出逢いがあやつるミステリー
危険なペルソナ
踊ろう! 踊ろう! 終わらない Dance beat
踊ろうよ踊ろう! 輝夜の城で
夜空を切りとるレーザービーム
私と見てよ?
まばゆい星が照らす想い
今宵の夢よ永遠に
明日のことは忘れたいの
私は紅い 薔薇の姫よ
激しくさらわれたい
そっと囁いて
意味ありげに目をそらす
あなたは白月の騎士
触れた手がまだ熱い
のがさずに抱きしめて
この奇跡を恋と呼ぶのね
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Come on! Come on! Tempting dance again
Come on, come on! To Kaguya's castle
A mystery manipulated by an encounter
A dangerous persona
Let's dance! Let's dance! An unending dance beat
Let's dance, let's dance! At Kaguya's castle
A laser beam cutting through the night sky
Will you watch it with me?
Feelings illuminated by dazzling stars
May this evening's dream be eternal
I want to forget about tomorrow
I am the crimson princess of roses
I want to be intensely carried away
Whisper softly
Looking away with a meaningful look
You are the knight of the white moon
The hand that touched me is still hot
Hold me without letting go
You call this miracle love, right?

scenes.description: Shirogane Noel is joined by other performers for the rest of the song.
scenes.performer_in_video: Shirogane Noel, Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare
